name: Mexican Dairy Dip
recipeInstructions:
LAYER #1
1. Blend all ingredients.
2. Spread in bottom of springform pan.
3. Chill for one hour.
LAYER #2
1. In a food processor or blender, blend cottage cheese and avocado until smooth.
2. Add 2 tbsp diced green chilies, 2 tbsp chopped onion, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 tbsp lemon juice.
3. Blend well to combine all ingredients.
4. Spread over the first layer.
5. Chill for one hour.
LAYER #3
1. In a bowl, mix 2 cups sour cream with diced tomato, half cup chopped green onions, and sliced black olives.
2. Spread over the second layer.
3. Chill for one hour.
4. Unmold and serve with taco chips or crackers.
5. Serves 10.
Note: In the picture, they show thin slices of avocado around the outside edge with a whole black olive at each end. Red pimento is crossed in the center, and green onions are sprinkled over top of that. Served on a bed of fancy leaf lettuce with the tips of taco chips underneath the mold all the way around.
Origin: Palm Dairy Ad (one of our Canadian dairies)
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
